mapper.sql: select q.question_id, q.course_id, q.course_name, q.student_user_id, q.student_name, q.parent_user_id, q.teacher_user_id, q.question_title, q.question_content, q.ai_answer, q.answer_status, q.safety_flag, q.create_by, q.create_time, q.update_by, q.update_time, q.remark from edu_homework_question q left join sys_user su on su.user_id = q.student_user_id left join sys_user pu on pu.user_id = q.parent_user_id left join sys_user tu on tu.user_id = q.teacher_user_id
mapper.select:
order by q.create_time desc, q.question_id desc
limit #{params.limitTop}
mapper.insert: insert into edu_homework_question (course_id, course_name, student_user_id, student_name, parent_user_id, teacher_user_id, question_title, question_content, ai_answer, answer_status, safety_flag, remark, create_by, create_time) values (#{courseId}, #{courseName}, #{studentUserId}, #{studentName}, #{parentUserId}, #{teacherUserId}, #{questionTitle}, #{questionContent}, #{aiAnswer}, #{answerStatus}, #{safetyFlag}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update edu_homework_question set ai_answer = #{aiAnswer}, answer_status = #{answerStatus}, safety_flag = #{safetyFlag}, update_time = sysdate() where question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.delete:
delete from edu_homework_question where question_id in
#{questionId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from edu_homework_question q left join sys_user su on su.user_id = q.student_user_id left join sys_user pu on pu.user_id = q.parent_user_id left join sys_user tu on tu.user_id = q.teacher_user_id
